items.title: Ancient Chinese medicine could transform hair loss treatment
items.summary: A traditional Chinese medicinal root used for over a thousand years is attracting new scientific attention for its potential to combat hair loss. items.title: Ozempic and similar weight-loss drugs linked to 30% lower breast cancer risk
items.summary: A large study found that women taking GLP-1 drugs, the medication class behind Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, and Zepbound, were about 30% less likely to develop breast cancer.
